title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_6640c474.jpg)

2. **DNUP**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![DNUP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_26232eed.jpg)

3. **Stonesaga**
*2026*
Cooperative survival crafting board game set in a unique and persistent world.
![Stonesaga](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_47cb15ef.jpg)

4. **War of the Dragon: The Wheel of Time**
*2027*
Wage war across a land of magic, prophecies, and powerful armies to save the world.
![War of the Dragon: The Wheel of Time](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_b85c3ecd.png)

5. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_2181576d.png)

6. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_dfc149cd.png)

7. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_fe1c6057.jpg)

8. **Eternal Sevens**
*2026*
A modern reinterpretation of the traditional card game Sevens.
![Eternal Sevens](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_5e9f2fbe.png)

9. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_46fec317.png)

10. **Earthborne Trailblazer**
*2027*
Blaze new trails as the Rangers of the Valley venture into untrodden lands.
![Earthborne Trailblazer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_bf4b5a2a.jpg)

11. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_2b751f88.jpg)

12. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_cfa021d9.jpg)

13. **Threaded: A Game of Needles and Points**
*2026*
Can you create the best bargello tapestries?
![Threaded: A Game of Needles and Points](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_5db94444.jpg)

14. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_fde2d368.jpg)

15. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_de4796e8.jpg)

16. **Excalibur**
*2026*
Compete, connive, and outwit your rivals to claim Excalibur as your own.
![Excalibur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_2fb9d991.jpg)

17. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_953aa67c.jpg)

18. **Deep Regrets**
*2025*
A game about fishing progressively more horrifying things out of the ocean.
![Deep Regrets](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_55ecb902.jpg)

19. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_cde1feed.jpg)

20. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_51f25876.jpg)

21. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_c59bf1e8.jpg)

22. **Possess Me, Satan**
*2026*
Use your role's ability to find the ghost and exorcise them.
![Possess Me, Satan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_f2c5d7f2.jpg)

23. **Feya's Swamp**
*2025*
Rise as the most prosperous clan in this magical swamp.
![Feya's Swamp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_9be10c83.png)

24. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_1b807689.jpg)

25. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*2020*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_f34573d1.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*16 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_0f2f5740.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*24 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.

*52 months on the list*

![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_93452950.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*19 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_7ef80656.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*88 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_f16cf02b.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*12 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_3426dd75.png)

7. **Azul**
*102 months on the list*

A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*31 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_77fbfda7.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*57 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_78b126b5.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*3 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_c65972df.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*24 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_f0fc46d0.png)

15. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*17 months on the list*

![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_56caf798.jpg)

17. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*64 months on the list*

![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_ef883236.jpg)

Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.

*41 months on the list*

25. **Splendor**
*144 months on the list*

![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-06-02/toplist/bgg_cff07f86.jpg)
